golden_media_eval_jobs_active_lease_chec.name: golden_media_eval_jobs_active_lease_check
golden_media_eval_jobs_active_lease_chec.value: "golden_media_eval_jobs"."status" NOT IN ('submitting', 'polling') OR ("golden_media_eval_jobs"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "golden_media_eval_jobs"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL AND "golden_media_eval_jobs"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)

golden_media_eval_jobs_remote_task_check.name: golden_media_eval_jobs_remote_task_check
golden_media_eval_jobs_remote_task_check.value: "golden_media_eval_jobs"."status" NOT IN ('submitted', 'polling') OR "golden_media_eval_jobs"."remote_task_id" IS NOT NULL

jobs_running_lease_check.name: jobs_running_lease_check
jobs_running_lease_check.value: "jobs"."status" <> 'running' OR ("jobs"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "jobs"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL AND "jobs"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)

motion_asset_assessments_dimensions_chec.name: motion_asset_assessments_dimensions_check
motion_asset_assessments_dimensions_chec.value: ("motion_asset_assessments"."width" IS NULL OR "motion_asset_assessments"."width" > 0) AND ("motion_asset_assessments"."height" IS NULL OR "motion_asset_assessments"."height" > 0)

motion_video_jobs_active_lease_check.name: motion_video_jobs_active_lease_check
motion_video_jobs_active_lease_check.value: "motion_video_jobs"."status" NOT IN ('submitting', 'polling', 'downloading', 'saving') OR ("motion_video_jobs"."lease_owner" IS NOT NULL AND "motion_video_jobs"."lease_token" IS NOT NULL AND "motion_video_jobs"."lease_expires_at" IS NOT NULL)

motion_video_jobs_remote_task_check.name: motion_video_jobs_remote_task_check
motion_video_jobs_remote_task_check.value: "motion_video_jobs"."status" NOT IN ('submitted', 'polling', 'downloading', 'saving', 'succeeded') OR "motion_video_jobs"."remote_task_id" IS NOT NULL

motion_video_jobs_succeeded_output_check.name: motion_video_jobs_succeeded_output_check
motion_video_jobs_succeeded_output_check.value: "motion_video_jobs"."status" <> 'succeeded' OR ("motion_video_jobs"."output_clip_id" IS NOT NULL AND "motion_video_jobs"."output_file_path" IS NOT NULL)
